The Global Prosperity Summit 2026 (GPS 2026) highlighted Hong Kong’s expanding role in international and regional cooperation both within China’s Global Governance Initiative as well as Apec, ahead of a meeting of the bloc’s economic leaders in neighbouring Shenzhen later this year.

news.headline: Israel, Russia hit back after being added to UN blacklist for sexual violence in conflicts
news.summary:
An annual United Nations report documenting sexual violence in conflicts worldwide has included Israeli forces for the first time since the review began more than 15 years ago for their treatment of Palestinian detainees. Israel denies the accusations.

news.headline: At least six feared dead after bridge collapses in northern India
news.summary: At least six feared dead after bridge collapses in northern India

news.headline: Mother-in-law of Indian bride whose death set off media frenzy arrested
news.summary: Twisha Sharma's death on 12 May has sparked rival claims of murder and suicide and dominated headlines.

news.headline: US price-fixing probe on Singaporean tycoon signals consistent legal approach
news.summary:
The US indictment of Singapore-based shipping tycoon Teo Siong Seng in a price-fixing scandal has raised questions about Washington’s determination to pursue prominent figures from friendly countries, though legal experts say the case conforms to established American antitrust practice.
